driver_subject: crypto: hisilicon/sec - Convert to platform remove callback returning void
kernel_subject: platform: Provide a remove callback that returns no value
stage1_reason: Driver changed from .remove to .remove_new callback as part of kernel-wide platform driver API migration to void-returning remove functions
stage2_reason: Kernel commit introduces platform_driver's remove_new callback returning void, matching driver migration from .remove to .remove_new in v6.6->v6.7 timeframe.
